title: Rich Content Management System Dashboard with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Rich Content Management System Dashboard with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f'/><g transform='translate(50,50)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='300' height='200' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/><rect x='10' y='10' width='280' height='180' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.5'/><text x='15' y='25' fill='#fff' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Content Library</text><line x1='15' y1='50' x2='285' y2='50' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='2'/><g transform='translate(20,70)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='120' height='120' fill='#411C56' rx='10'/><text x='15' y='120' fill='#fff' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Filters</text></g></g><g transform='translate(50,250)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='50' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='15' y='25' fill='#fff' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Analytics</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates and dynamic filtering
Must include a robust media library with real-time analytics

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Rich Content Management System Dashboard with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filtering capabilities, dynamic media library, and real-time analytics.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, efficient state use, and adherence to the starter code structure.
